summary: Iteration 4: Testing UI Redesign (Apple-like), Push Notifications backend, and Admin Panel. All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating to /subscription as customer redirects to /dashboard. This is intentional (subscription is studio-only) but worth confirming design intent.

critical_code_review_comments: Subscription page /subscription redirects customers to dashboard — this is likely intentional (only studio owners need subscriptions), but no explicit error message explaining why. Consider showing a message or the public plan page instead of silently redirecting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration work: 1) Landing page has Apple-like redesign with Playfair Display headings, hero section, featured studios, how-it-works section. 2) Admin login (admin@inkbook.com/admin123) redirects to /admin with 4 tabs: Übersicht (stats), Studios (with toggle active/verified), Nutzer, Buchungen. Bell icon visible in navbar for logged-in users. Admin link shown in user dropdown. 3) VAPID push notification endpoint /api/notifications/vapid-public-key returns public_key. 4) Search page loads with studio cards and filter button. 5) Customer dashboard shows bookings. 6) Studio dashboard shows 5 tabs (Übersicht, Slots, Buchungen, Artists, Profil). 7) Subscription page shows Basic €29 / Pro €79 with comparison table — only accessible for studio_owner role.
verified_features: Landing page: Hero, How-It-Works, Featured Studios ✓
Search page: Studios listed, Filter button ✓
Admin panel Overview tab: total_studios=6, total_users=5, total_bookings=6 ✓
Admin Studios tab: table with toggle buttons (8 found, toggle works) ✓
Admin Buchungen tab: loads with booking list ✓
Studio dashboard: 5 tabs (Übersicht, Slots, Buchungen, Artists, Profil) ✓
Messages page: sidebar + chat panel layout ✓
Subscription page: Basic €29, Pro €79, comparison table ✓
Admin CRUD studio toggle status/verified via PATCH /api/admin/studios/{id} ✓
